drafts.proposed_case_title: Mock Case: EEOC Resume Screening Discrimination Warning
drafts.business_risk: Significant regulatory scrutiny and class-action liability under mock governance rules.
vendor_questions: Has this resume tool been audited for systematic bias against non-native speakers?
drafts.training_lesson: Avoid using unhedged language model filters for critical qualification screening.
drafts.clean_room_summary: MOCK SYNTHETIC DRAFT: Standardized testing report outlining how automated hiring resume screening systems can introduce demographic bias without continuous human audibility. Used strictly for offline validation/testing.

drafts.proposed_case_title: Mock Case: CNIL Biometric Retail Profiling Consent Enforcement
drafts.business_risk: Substantial GDPR fines and loss of consumer trust in the retail space.
vendor_questions: Do you store raw biometric facial images or only localized numerical hashes?
drafts.training_lesson: Never deploy biometric analysis in public venues without active, uncoerced consumer opt-in.
drafts.clean_room_summary: MOCK SYNTHETIC DRAFT: Regulatory enforcement advisory analyzing consumer consent gates for emotional and facial profiling systems deployed inside physical spaces. Used strictly for offline validation/testing.

drafts.proposed_case_title: Mock Case: FDA Diagnostic Drift Clinical Calibration Alert
drafts.business_risk: Severe patient safety liability and clinical malpractice exposure.
vendor_questions: What dataset drift detection mechanisms are built into the clinical recommendation software?
drafts.training_lesson: Establish continuous verification systems to capture diagnostic variance as patient demographics shift.
drafts.clean_room_summary: MOCK SYNTHETIC DRAFT: Safety warning outlining calibration errors in healthcare AI models resulting from clinical environment shifts. Used strictly for offline validation/testing.

drafts.proposed_case_title: Mock Case: CFPB Explainable Adverse Action Credit Underwriting Alert
drafts.business_risk: Regulatory enforcement actions and compliance penalties under credit protection laws.
vendor_questions: How are model feature weights translated into consumer adverse action reason codes?
drafts.training_lesson: Ensure ML-driven scoring models produce human-understandable explanation codes.
drafts.clean_room_summary: MOCK SYNTHETIC DRAFT: Credit scoring advisory outlining the transparency requirements for automated underwriting decisioning algorithms. Used strictly for offline validation/testing.

drafts.proposed_case_title: Mock Case: Third-Party Customer Chatbot Hallucination and Data Leak
drafts.business_risk: Exposure of competitive pricing secrets and breach of customer confidentiality.
vendor_questions: What guardrails or leakage prevention filters are implemented in your hosted chatbot API?
drafts.training_lesson: Never hook customer-facing LLMs directly to backend knowledge bases without deep input/output guardrails.
drafts.clean_room_summary: MOCK SYNTHETIC DRAFT: Commercial incident review on corporate data leakage caused by vendor conversational interface hallucinations. Used strictly for offline validation/testing.
